Burrow Ambush
upgrades.description: When this unit is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve the PLACE (18) effect from the player's Entry Edge and at least 10" away from Enemy units. This unit's Activation ends.
When determining Charge Distance for this unit, you may roll 2D6 instead of D6 and select the highest result to add to the unit's Speed characteristic.
